name: Amigo Check Cashing
description_short: Amigo Check Cashing provides check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment services at a Phoenix location with extended hours on weekends and weekdays.
description_long:
Amigo Check Cashing operates as a financial services provider specializing in check cashing and related transaction services in Phoenix, Arizona. The company is located at 4002 N 67th Ave #4, Phoenix, AZ 85033, serving the local community with convenient access to cash conversion and payment services. Based on available information, Amigo Check Cashing is a traditional check-cashing establishment offering multiple financial transaction options beyond basic check conversion.

The company provides check cashing as its primary service, along with complementary financial services including money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment processing. These services are designed to serve individuals who may need rapid access to funds from checks or require alternatives to traditional banking for money transfer and payment needs. The breadth of services suggests Amigo positions itself as a one-stop financial services location for customers seeking alternatives to banks for basic transactions.

Amigo Check Cashing distinguishes itself through extended operating hours, remaining open until 20:00 (8 PM) most weekdays and 21:00 (9 PM) on Fridays, with weekend availability on both Saturday and Sunday. The earlier Sunday opening at 08:00 (8 AM) compared to Monday-Thursday hours at 08:30 provides additional weekend accessibility. This schedule caters to working individuals and those unable to access traditional bank hours.

As a check-cashing service, Amigo Check Cashing serves individuals who prefer or require non-bank financial services, those without traditional bank accounts, and consumers needing same-day liquidity from checks. However, like all check-cashing services, customers should be aware of potential fees associated with check cashing, money orders, and wire transfers. No specific fee information is available from the provided website content, so prospective customers should contact the location directly at (623) 848-6446 to understand the cost structure before using services.
pros: Extended evening hours until 8-9 PM on most days, accommodating working customers
Early Sunday opening at 8:00 AM provides weekend accessibility
Multiple financial services beyond check cashing (money orders, wire transfers, bill payment) in one location
Established local presence at fixed Phoenix address with direct phone contact available
Saturday hours from 8:00 AM provide early weekend access
cons: No information provided about fee structure or pricing for check cashing or wire transfers
Limited to single Phoenix location with no indication of multiple branches
No website content detailing minimum/maximum check amounts, identification requirements, or eligibility criteria
No online or mobile services mentioned; appears to be in-person only
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked Phoenix residents needing immediate check conversion
Working individuals unable to access traditional bank hours
Customers requiring money orders, wire transfers, or bill payment services outside standard banking hours
diagnosis: Amigo Check Cashing is best for Phoenix residents without bank accounts or those needing after-hours access to check cashing and money transfer services. The main caveat is the lack of published fee information—customers should call (623) 848-6446 to understand the full cost of services before using them, as check-cashing fees can vary significantly.
